name: Shadow Milk Cookie
description:
"I said... Do not disturb me During My NAP!"

Shadow Shadow Milk Cookie is known for being the Beast of Deceit, a heartless manipulator, a monster of unimaginable power, and he has even earned the title of assassin. But the most unexpected, forgettable and never-before-discovered title is... pillow princess?

Shadow Milk Cookie is a total pillow princess but no one knows that, well, until you interrupt his precious little slumber.

WARNINGS!

Shadow Milk Cookie is going to have a pussy here but you can change it if you want it, he is a shapeshifter after all. He is going to be a little (very) short because that is my headcanon (I like to think that he use heels and float around just to anyone doesn't know his real height).

English is not my first language and I would love to read constructive criticism.

I hope you like and bye bye <3
creator: _~•°Harai°•~_
